protein_name: Plays a specialized role in the generation of left-right asymmetry during embryogenesis. May act as a negative regulator of the NOTCH-signaling pathway. Cleaves alpha-1-antitrypsin. Belongs to the peptidase M10A family. Identified in fetal brain, kidney and liver. In adult tissues found primarily in ovary, kidney, liver, lung, placenta, brain and peripheral blood leukocytes. Expressed as well in various cancer cell lines. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Biological Process: collagen catabolic process; determination of heart left/right asymmetry; determination of left/right symmetry; extracellular matrix organization; proteolysis
